fields.label: Manual attended read-only scope
fields.value: Observe DevHub account-scoped pages only after manual login handoff; do not upload, submit, certify, schedule, cancel, or pay.

fields.label: Redaction attestation summary
fields.value: Only commit-safe metadata and synthetic fixture values are present.

fields.label: Observation scope summary
fields.value: Read-only review of headings, labels, statuses, and journal-safe metadata.

fields.label: Abort condition summary
fields.value: Abort on CAPTCHA, MFA prompt, credential prompt, private value exposure, upload, payment, certification, scheduling, cancellation, or submission.

fields.label: Post-action hardening notes
fields.value: Keep selectors metadata-only, preserve exact-confirmation gates, and reject any workflow that requests consequential actions.

redaction_attestations.statement: The packet contains no credentials, cookies, auth state, screenshots, traces, HAR files, payment details, private uploads, local private file paths, or raw authenticated page values.
All values are deterministic fixture values suitable for committed tests.

allowed: confirm authenticated landing state by generic page role or heading
record redacted accessible labels and non-private status metadata
stop before any official change or data entry

abort_conditions.trigger: A private account value, credential, document content, payment detail, or local private path would need to be recorded.
abort_conditions.operator_action: Stop observation and record only the redacted abort journal event.

abort_conditions.trigger: The page requires upload, submit, certify, schedule, cancel, payment, account creation, CAPTCHA automation, MFA automation, or credential entry.
abort_conditions.operator_action: Stop automation, hand control to the human operator, and do not continue without a separate exact-confirmation workflow.

post_action_hardening_notes.notes: Before any future live attended session, keep the packet fixture-first, validate all redaction attestations, cross-check abort conditions against journal event IDs, and preserve read-only scope.
follow_up_controls: Require this validator to pass before live attended pilot scheduling.
Reject packets that authorize live sessions or omit abort-condition journal links.
Keep evidence templates free of private DevHub values and browser artifacts.
